SEARCH
Package com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.ai

Class HostileAI

java.lang.Object
com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.ai.HostileAI
All Implemented Interfaces:
EntityAI, org.bukkit.event.Listener
public class HostileAI extends Object implements EntityAI
Hostile AI implementation

Defines aggressive behavior for entities, including target acquisition, attacking, and rotation towards targets.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors

    Description
    HostileAI(DumbEntity entity, org.bukkit.entity.LivingEntity instance)
    Creates a new HostileAI instance for the given entity and its Bukkit instance.

  • Constructor Details

    • HostileAI

      public HostileAI(DumbEntity entity, org.bukkit.entity.LivingEntity instance)
      Creates a new HostileAI instance for the given entity and its Bukkit instance.
      Parameters:
      entity - The mob type this ai instance is controlling
      instance - The entity instance this ai instance is controlling

  • Method Details

    • setAggroRange

      public void setAggroRange(double range)
      Sets the aggro range for this AI, determining how far it can detect and target players.
      Parameters:
      range - The aggro range in blocks

    • getEntity

      public DumbEntity getEntity()
      Gets the mob type this AI instance is controlling.
      Specified by:
      getEntity in interface EntityAI

      The DumbEntity instance representing this AI's mob type

      public org.bukkit.entity.LivingEntity getInstance()
      Gets the Bukkit entity instance this AI is controlling.

      getInstance in interface EntityAI
      Returns:

      Gets the aggro range for this AI, determining how far it can detect and target players.

      getRange in interface EntityAI
      Returns:

    • getCooldownRemaining

      public float getCooldownRemaining()
      Gets the remaining cooldown before the AI can attack again.
      Specified by:
      getCooldownRemaining in interface EntityAI
      Returns:
      The remaining cooldown in ticks before the AI can attack again

    • setCooldownRemaining

      public void setCooldownRemaining(float cooldown)
      Sets the remaining cooldown before the AI can attack again.
      Specified by:
      setCooldownRemaining in interface EntityAI
      Parameters:
      cooldown - The cooldown in ticks to set

    • onTick

      public void onTick()
      Checks for nearby targets, rotates towards them, and attacks if possible. Called every tick by default.
      Specified by:
      onTick in interface EntityAI

    • onHurt

      public void onHurt(org.bukkit.event.entity.EntityDamageByEntityEvent event)
      Sets the AI's target to the damager when the entity is hurt.
      Specified by:
      onHurt in interface EntityAI
      Parameters:
      event - The EntityDamageByEntityEvent triggered when the entity is hurt
